problem id: 4740c20c
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(4) XOR SHR(6)) AND ROT(5)

examples:
  01111001 -> 00000001
  00010000 -> 00000000
  10011110 -> 11000010
  11001000 -> 00000001
  11110000 -> 00000010
  00100101 -> 00000000
  01010010 -> 00000000
  00000111 -> 01100000

query: 01000000
predicted answer: 00000000
